# Communication Knowledge Base

> **Purpose**: Adaptive explanations, audience analysis, meeting analysis, and stakeholder communication
> **MCP Validated**: 2026-02-17

## Quick Navigation

### Concepts (< 150 lines each)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [concepts/audience-analysis.md](concepts/audience-analysis.md) | Identify audience expertise level, goals, and context |
| [concepts/progressive-disclosure.md](concepts/progressive-disclosure.md) | Layer complexity gradually from simple to advanced |
| [concepts/analogies.md](concepts/analogies.md) | Build technical analogies that bridge knowledge gaps |

### Patterns (< 200 lines each)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [patterns/adaptive-explanation.md](patterns/adaptive-explanation.md) | Adjust explanation depth and vocabulary to audience |
| [patterns/meeting-extraction.md](patterns/meeting-extraction.md) | Extract decisions, action items, and risks from meetings |
| [patterns/stakeholder-report.md](patterns/stakeholder-report.md) | Generate executive summaries for different audiences |

### Specs (Machine-Readable)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [specs/communication-frameworks.yaml](specs/communication-frameworks.yaml) | Communication framework definitions and decision rules |

## Key Concepts

| Concept | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Audience Analysis** | Classify listeners by expertise, role, and information needs |
| **Progressive Disclosure** | Reveal complexity in layers: headline, summary, detail, deep-dive |
| **Analogies** | Map unfamiliar technical concepts to familiar domains |

---

## Learning Path

| Level | Files |
|-------|-------|
| **Beginner** | concepts/audience-analysis.md, concepts/analogies.md |
| **Intermediate** | concepts/progressive-disclosure.md, patterns/adaptive-explanation.md |
| **Advanced** | patterns/meeting-extraction.md, patterns/stakeholder-report.md |

---

## Agent Usage

| Agent | Primary Files | Use Case |
|-------|---------------|----------|
| meeting-analyst | patterns/meeting-extraction.md, patterns/stakeholder-report.md | Extract structured insights from meeting transcripts |
